title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Amazon India Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Amazon India Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
We at Amazon India Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Software Engineer based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Amazon India Advisory Limited:
Amazon India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon India Advisory Limited!
